creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

We've already updated webkit to 1.1.6 in MarcusCom CVS.  Additionally, 
you latest patch is corrupt.  Can you download the 1.1.6 work from CVS, and 
provie a 1.1.7 diff with your plug-in fixes to that port? 

http://www.marcuscom.com:8080/cgi-bin/cvsweb.cgi/ports/www/webkit-gtk2/
